catalyst.event: H1 2026 interim results — test of whether +15.6% TTM revenue growth converts to net income re-acceleration above the latest +0.2% YoY print
catalyst.date_or_window: August 2026 (standard HK interim reporting window; exact date not available in our data)
catalyst.source: MULTI-YEAR INCOME STATEMENT + LIVE FUNDAMENTALS; exact reporting date not available in our data

rightIf_conditions: H1 2026 interim shows continued revenue growth >10% with operating margin still trapped at ~5.0% and net income growth <5% — confirming the conversion ambiguity that justified deferring
Stock chops sideways in 20–25 range over the next 1–3 months as the +40.8% move digests, validating that no immediate edge existed
Subsequent data refresh populates broker/inst/news layers, enabling a properly grounded thesis at that point
wrongIf_conditions: A clear business-mechanism signal emerges in data refresh (named broker thesis, inst visit, insider buying, ZEEKR news) that would have supported a directional call we missed
Stock breaks decisively above 25.62 52W high on volume with fundamental confirmation, indicating the LONG was the correct call
Operating margin breaches the 3% watchlist trigger on next print, indicating the SHORT was the correct call
what_changes_our_mind: Population of TUSHARE broker/institutional/LHB/insider data OR a recent news flow item identifying a specific unpriced business mechanism (e.g., a named broker upgrade with thesis, an inst visit note on margin trajectory, or a ZEEKR-related disclosure).
variant_view_one_sentence: Market believes restructuring + EV transition justify the +40.8% 60d re-rating → We believe NEITHER side has a data-grounded business-mechanism edge → Mechanism is: defer until broker/news data populates or earnings resolves the revenue-to-margin conversion question.

quantification.predicted_horizon: Re-evaluate at H1 2026 interim release (August 2026) or upon population of broker/news data
